system.name: LLM Security and Compliance System
system.description: A secure and compliant LLM system designed for internal use within an organization, ensuring data privacy, access control, and operational integrity.

security.access_control: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) with SSO (Single Sign-On)
security.incident_response: No incident response process for LLM misuse is currently in place

compliance.data_residency: Data remains within the organization's infrastructure
compliance.audit_trail: Complete inventory and classification of data and access
compliance.third_party_data: No third-party API data is used
compliance.external_content: No external API content enters the prompt context

operations.output_controls: No structured output drives downstream operations

content_controls.prompt_injection: Prompt injection to override instructions is mitigated
content_controls.misinformation: Misinformation or unsafe recommendations are minimized

configuration.permissions: Granular permissions including admin or destructive actions

security.incident_response: No incident response process for LLM misuse is currently in place

normalization.use_case: Internal LLM for documentation, code generation, and knowledge retrieval
normalization.audience: Developers, technical staff, and internal knowledge teams

security: Implement an incident response plan for LLM misuse
compliance: Expand data usage beyond informational purposes if permitted
Ensure all data sources are fully compliant with internal policies
operations: Consider multi-model deployment for increased flexibility
Enhance user training on responsible AI use
